title: 第 9 課｜角動量：旋轉的守恆量｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
旋轉運動也有自己的守恆量。從 M = r × p 定義角動量，理解外力矩為零時的角動量守恆，以及它與旋轉對稱性的關係。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 9 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 9 | Angular Momentum and Rotation | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
Rotation has its own conserved quantity. Starting from M = r × p, we connect zero external torque with conservation of angular momentum and rotational symmetry.

Lesson 9 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
